aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

chapter_spine.conflict: Occupied-school routine, Martha's push toward open resistance, and Owen's desire to stay unnoticed while the library damage offers an opening.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen moves from passive endurance to active secret pursuit once the footnote and obsolete shelf marks line up.
must_land_beats: Establish Hogwarts under Snape and the Carrows as a place of daily humiliation rather than heroic set piece.
Place Owen at the Hufflepuff breakfast table as competent at getting by and evasive about helping.
Show the pre-1883 Binns copy of A History of Magic and the impossible footnote to North Stacks C-13.
Use blasted library damage to expose old shelf numerals and give Owen a concrete reason to investigate now.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Occupied-school routine, Martha's push toward open resistance, and Owen's desire to stay unnoticed while the library damage offers an opening.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen moves from passive endurance to active secret pursuit once the footnote and obsolete shelf marks line up.

chapter_spine.conflict: Curfew, library patrols, and the risk of being caught in a place that should no longer exist.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen gains the Grinlow Leaves, a First Art burn on his palm, and proof that magic has a rule-editing substrate.
must_land_beats: Map North Stacks C-13 through obsolete shelf marks and an old prefect guide rather than luck.
Use the kitchen-adjacent crawlspace to explain why a student of Owen's size can reach the coffer and adults likely cannot.
Make clear that the lead coffer resists Summoning and catalog magic, explaining why the manuscript stayed lost.
Reveal that some manuscript pages describe the First Art while others imply the Meridian Commonwealth left Earth behind wards.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Curfew, library patrols, and the risk of being caught in a place that should no longer exist.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen gains the Grinlow Leaves, a First Art burn on his palm, and proof that magic has a rule-editing substrate.

chapter_spine.conflict: The resistance needs actionable help now, and Owen arrives with a theory too large and too poorly framed to earn trust.
chapter_spine.consequence: Nobody with power or urgency believes Owen, but Prue notices the impossible citation and becomes the first possible ally.
must_land_beats: Stage the Room of Requirement meeting as full of concrete wartime pressure before Owen interrupts it.
Let Neville reject the pitch for coherent reasons rather than stupidity or incuriosity.
Make Owen's own explanation socially disastrous: too abstract, under-evidenced, and timed against real danger.
Give Prue one precise bibliographic question that marks her as the only listener who heard the impossible part.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The resistance needs actionable help now, and Owen arrives with a theory too large and too poorly framed to earn trust.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Nobody with power or urgency believes Owen, but Prue notices the impossible citation and becomes the first possible ally.

chapter_spine.conflict: Owen's impatience, incomplete instructions, and the fact that First Art affects conditions rather than obedient targets.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen proves the First Art is real, dangerous, and incompatible with the clean boundaries of school spellwork.
must_land_beats: Decode a first exercise from the manuscript only after Owen's burn has already changed how the pages answer him.
Run the greenhouse experiment as a sincere attempt at something small and controlled.
Have the failure spread by category so doors and latches answer the amended condition instead of the intended vine.
End with bodily and magical cost: deepened burn, wand unreliability, and a new respect for collateral consequences.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Owen's impatience, incomplete instructions, and the fact that First Art affects conditions rather than obedient targets.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen proves the First Art is real, dangerous, and incompatible with the clean boundaries of school spellwork.

chapter_spine.conflict: Secrecy now conflicts with Owen's need for another mind able to parse the manuscript's censored references.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen lets Prue into the work, and together they surface the first ward tables.
must_land_beats: Prue proves the footnote survived from a censored print lineage and therefore cannot be dismissed as Owen's panic.
Give the chapter genuine stillness: food, cold, boredom, and mundane talk not immediately instrumentalized.
Use Prue's astronomy overlays to reveal new text rather than having exposition arrive from nowhere.
End with a conscious choice from Owen to share rather than merely fail to hide.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Secrecy now conflicts with Owen's need for another mind able to parse the manuscript's censored references.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen lets Prue into the work, and together they surface the first ward tables.

chapter_spine.conflict: Carrow punishment, public cruelty, and Owen's half-formed ability to intervene without exposing himself.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen discovers that First Art can alter immediate violence, but each use brands him and the castle more visibly.
must_land_beats: Force Owen into a punishment scene he would prefer to treat as wasted time.
Have Amycus's cruelty feel improvised, intimate, and pedagogical in the worst way.
Let the amendment on contact save Martha imperfectly rather than cleanly or heroically.
Show the aftermath in magical terms as well as bodily ones: ward scar, wand recoil, and the sense of having rung a bell Snape can hear.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Carrow punishment, public cruelty, and Owen's half-formed ability to intervene without exposing himself.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen discovers that First Art can alter immediate violence, but each use brands him and the castle more visibly.

chapter_spine.conflict: The manuscript has answered Owen's first scar, and Tallow's taboo against the old work conflicts with the need to see the deeper site.
chapter_spine.consequence: The First Art's cosmic context becomes factual when Owen reaches the East Undercroft and the Hogwarts anchor stone.
must_land_beats: Use Tallow's route and the recent ward disturbance to justify access to the undercroft now.
Describe the anchor stone as material evidence, not mystical mood alone.
Confirm the Meridian Commonwealth departed Earth deliberately rather than dying out.
Make the larger threat feel credible without over-defining it into a pulp monster.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The manuscript has answered Owen's first scar, and Tallow's taboo against the old work conflicts with the need to see the deeper site.
chapter_spine.state_shift: The First Art's cosmic context becomes factual when Owen reaches the East Undercroft and the Hogwarts anchor stone.

chapter_spine.conflict: The school briefly quiets for Christmas, but absence and loss keep intruding on any attempt at ordinary comfort.
chapter_spine.consequence: Martha and Prue both begin to feel that Owen's emotional scale has slipped away from theirs.
must_land_beats: Stage a non-strategic meal in the kitchens with enough texture to re-establish what daily life is supposed to feel like.
Let news of disappearances and removals sit in the room without turning the chapter into a briefing.
Show Owen trying and failing to answer Martha at the scale of her actual fear.
End with a relational shift rather than a plot twist: he is still physically present but no longer fully among them.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The school briefly quiets for Christmas, but absence and loss keep intruding on any attempt at ordinary comfort.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Martha and Prue both begin to feel that Owen's emotional scale has slipped away from theirs.

chapter_spine.conflict: The resistance needs a corridor sabotage to work, while Owen is using the same operation as cover for his own route.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen's secrecy and divided motive turn him into a liability, and the resistance stops treating him as merely unhelpful.
must_land_beats: Make Martha's recruitment of Owen emotionally credible: she is still trying to pull him back in.
Build the sabotage with practical wartime details before Owen's amendment derails it.
Let the comic chaos arise from conditional logic gone wrong, not random slapstick.
End with Martha taking punishment and Owen choosing silence, which changes how everyone sees him.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The resistance needs a corridor sabotage to work, while Owen is using the same operation as cover for his own route.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen's secrecy and divided motive turn him into a liability, and the resistance stops treating him as merely unhelpful.

chapter_spine.conflict: The ward problem is now large enough that Owen needs Prue's help, but his priorities are becoming ethically indefensible to her.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen and Prue identify the four failing anchors, and Prue understands that his future power may not be used for the people in front of him.
must_land_beats: Keep the chapter physically small and temporally concentrated: one long night of work.
Translate the manuscript into a legible ward map with four anchors and Hogwarts as the most immediately stressed node.
Allow some charged closeness without falsely converting the book into a romance engine.
Make Prue's distrust arise from what Owen plainly says, not from avoidable misunderstanding.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The ward problem is now large enough that Owen needs Prue's help, but his priorities are becoming ethically indefensible to her.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen and Prue identify the four failing anchors, and Prue understands that his future power may not be used for the people in front of him.

chapter_spine.conflict: Snape has noticed the ward scars, and Neville now reads every move Owen makes through the lens of collaboration or cowardice.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen learns Snape knows enough about pre-wand magic to be dangerous, while the resistance begins to treat him as compromised.
must_land_beats: Make the summons feel like surveillance closing rather than random convenience.
Let Snape speak with partial knowledge and strategic ambiguity rather than explanatory generosity.
Include a warning that the castle itself can answer old work if pushed too hard.
Follow the interview with a human, not mystical, consequence: Neville's trust drops further.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Snape has noticed the ward scars, and Neville now reads every move Owen makes through the lens of collaboration or cowardice.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen learns Snape knows enough about pre-wand magic to be dangerous, while the resistance begins to treat him as compromised.

chapter_spine.conflict: Owen now has a prepared amendment and a friend in immediate danger, but using the work would spend time, strength, and ward stability he wants for the deeper task.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen crosses from distracted neglect into conscious refusal, and Martha names the choice for what it is.
must_land_beats: Stage Martha's exemplary detention as specific cruelty, not abstract wartime summary.
Make clear that Owen could plausibly intervene at a meaningful local scale now.
Let his refusal be a choice he rationalizes, not an accident or mistiming.
Have Martha end the friendship in language that strips away his self-flattering excuses.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Owen now has a prepared amendment and a friend in immediate danger, but using the work would spend time, strength, and ward stability he wants for the deeper task.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen crosses from distracted neglect into conscious refusal, and Martha names the choice for what it is.

chapter_spine.conflict: The anchor site has yielded a second route, and Owen needs certainty about the scale and timing of the outside threat.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen learns that a major magical battle at Hogwarts will brighten the ward crack into a real breach condition.
must_land_beats: Open the Departure Chamber through logic established by the anchor tables rather than sudden luck.
Use the star-lens to show predatory attention beyond Earth without collapsing mystery into overdescription.
Tie the imminent breach risk specifically to battle-scale magic at Hogwarts.
Turn Owen's obsession into emergency labor with a deadline.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The anchor site has yielded a second route, and Owen needs certainty about the scale and timing of the outside threat.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen learns that a major magical battle at Hogwarts will brighten the ward crack into a real breach condition.

chapter_spine.conflict: Spring offers ordinary life back in fragments, and Prue gives Owen one last chance to bind the larger work to immediate human loyalty.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen chooses the hidden labor over his last intimate human bond.
must_land_beats: Give the school enough ordinary spring texture that the coming battle still feels like an interruption to lived life.
Let Prue articulate a real compromise: help the living first, then resume the deeper work.
Use Tallow's changing patience to show the castle's older moral scale pushing back on Owen.
End with Owen alone by choice, not just because others abandon him.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Spring offers ordinary life back in fragments, and Prue gives Owen one last chance to bind the larger work to immediate human loyalty.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen chooses the hidden labor over his last intimate human bond.

chapter_spine.conflict: Harry's return turns Hogwarts into open war at the exact moment Owen knows battle magic will stress the anchor past safety.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen openly deserts the human war for the deeper repair, and Prue witnesses the choice in real time.
must_land_beats: Use the castle's sudden hope and mobilization to create emotional pressure, not just spectacle.
Make Owen's interpretation of the same event meaningfully different from everyone else's.
Have Neville and Martha remain legible as people fighting for each other, not as abstractions Owen is leaving behind.
End with Prue giving him a direct chance to turn back and Owen refusing.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Harry's return turns Hogwarts into open war at the exact moment Owen knows battle magic will stress the anchor past safety.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen openly deserts the human war for the deeper repair, and Prue witnesses the choice in real time.

chapter_spine.conflict: The battle is shaking Hogwarts apart while Owen attempts a First Art working far beyond anything he has previously sustained.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen gains enough control over the anchor to discover a combat-ending clause and chooses not to use it.
must_land_beats: Render the ritual as material labor involving blood, phrasing, surfaces, and concentration rather than generic wizard spectacle.
Let the battle above distort the ritual through stone vibration, smoke, and magical overload.
Reveal a credible local clause that could end hostile wandwork within Hogwarts quickly.
Force Owen to choose attention allocation explicitly rather than drifting past the option.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: The battle is shaking Hogwarts apart while Owen attempts a First Art working far beyond anything he has previously sustained.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen gains enough control over the anchor to discover a combat-ending clause and chooses not to use it.

chapter_spine.conflict: Prue reaches the chamber during the battle's hinge and makes the moral question impossible to keep private.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen's choice becomes fully witnessed and therefore irreducible: he is withholding salvation, not lacking it.
must_land_beats: Bring Prue into the chamber through access logic established earlier; she knows the route because Owen brought her into the work in chapter 10.
Show that she understands the dormant clause well enough to name what he is choosing.
Keep the battle itself mostly overhead so the chapter remains about refusal, not duel choreography.
Let the war end by other hands while Owen stays with the ward.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Prue reaches the chamber during the battle's hinge and makes the moral question impossible to keep private.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen's choice becomes fully witnessed and therefore irreducible: he is withholding salvation, not lacking it.

chapter_spine.conflict: Hogwarts can finally see the end of one war, while Owen alone understands that the deeper crisis has only been delayed.
chapter_spine.consequence: Owen survives into a secret custodial vocation at the cost of ordinary belonging, forgiveness, and heroic legibility.
must_land_beats: Keep dawn after battle physically specific: smoke, bodies, fatigue, shattered stone, administrative confusion kept offstage.
Let Martha and Prue respond differently but without absolving Owen.
Clarify whether the Grinlow Leaves are rehidden, retained, or partially absorbed into the undercroft so later drafting stays consistent.
End on continued labor rather than triumphant closure.
chapter_spine.pressure_source: Hogwarts can finally see the end of one war, while Owen alone understands that the deeper crisis has only been delayed.
chapter_spine.state_shift: Owen survives into a secret custodial vocation at the cost of ordinary belonging, forgiveness, and heroic legibility.

character_state_table.evasion_style: He dodges by answering the most literal version of a question, acting as if timing rather than values is the real issue, or retreating into method.
character_state_table.indirectness: Direct about process and indirect about guilt, affection, fear, or the value judgments under his choices.
character_state_table.interruption_habit: He cuts in to correct imprecision or preserve a train of thought, then often realizes too late that he has been rude.
character_state_table.private_register: Much more exacting once he is alone or speaking about the First Art; his language starts sorting reality into tolerances, thresholds, and conditions.
character_state_table.public_register: Apologetic, practical schoolboy speech that sounds as if he expects interruption and would rather not be the center of the room.
character_state_table.repetition_tolerance: Some repeated constraint language is natural for him under pressure, but repeated elegant formulations or signature catchphrases would feel false.
character_state_table.self_correction_tendency: He revises mid-sentence toward smaller, narrower claims whenever he suspects the larger statement may be inaccurate.
character_state_table.sentence_completion_style: He usually finishes sentences unless emotionally cornered; then he restarts with smaller, safer claims.
character_state_table.stress_tells: When stressed he over-specifies practical constraints, narrows questions to their literal wording, and can go disturbingly calm instead of louder.

character_state_table.evasion_style: She changes the subject to a task, a body, or a joke when she cannot afford to talk about what hurts.
character_state_table.indirectness: Fairly direct, except around personal fear and tenderness, where she may detour into practical talk.
character_state_table.interruption_habit: She cuts in to stop nonsense early and will physically keep doing another task while she talks over someone.
character_state_table.private_register: Sharper and more wounded when trust is broken; she gets plainer rather than more ornate when speaking from hurt.
character_state_table.public_register: Blunt, warm, ordinary Hufflepuff speech with practical jokes, domestic references, and very little patience for grandiosity.
character_state_table.repetition_tolerance: Purposeful repetition fits her when she is fed up or trying to make a frightened person calm down; verbal ornament does not.
character_state_table.self_correction_tendency: She rarely revises for precision; she revises when she realizes she has almost said something softer than she means.
character_state_table.sentence_completion_style: She usually lands her sentence cleanly, but anger can make her chop the ending off because the point is already obvious to her.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Under stress she gets brisker, less decorative, and more likely to repeat the core of a point because nobody listened the first time.

character_state_table.evasion_style: She hides behind questions, classification, and tone control, especially when she is close to saying something personal.
character_state_table.indirectness: Moderately direct about ideas, more oblique about desire, loneliness, and any feeling that could sound theatrical.
character_state_table.interruption_habit: She interrupts to refine a premise or stop a false assumption before it hardens, not to dominate the room.
character_state_table.private_register: More hesitant and more revealing than her public dryness suggests, especially when curiosity and care are pulling in the same direction.
character_state_table.public_register: Dry, observant, and carefully informal; she sounds intelligent without announcing intelligence as a social identity.
character_state_table.repetition_tolerance: A little repeated phrasing suits her when she is trying not to lose the thread; polished refrain-like repetition would feel too composed.
character_state_table.self_correction_tendency: She revises by narrowing and rephrasing, often stepping back from a too-neat sentence to something messier but truer.
character_state_table.sentence_completion_style: She usually completes sentences, but emotional pressure produces restarts and quiet repairs rather than abrupt trail-offs.
character_state_table.stress_tells: When pressured she gets quieter, more exact, and slightly more repetitive around the piece she cannot make the other person acknowledge.

character_state_table.evasion_style: He dodges personal discussion by assigning a task or asking who still needs help.
character_state_table.indirectness: Direct about danger, skeptical about excuses, and awkwardly indirect only around praise or his own fear.
character_state_table.interruption_habit: He interrupts only when time is short or someone is endangering others.
character_state_table.private_register: More tired and angrier than he lets on, with flashes of blunt grief that he usually puts back into action fast.
character_state_table.public_register: Plain, steady, and unshowy. He sounds like someone doing necessary work rather than performing leadership.
character_state_table.repetition_tolerance: Functional repetition fits him in command mode; polished rhetorical repetition does not.
character_state_table.self_correction_tendency: He seldom self-corrects for style; he corrects factual mistakes quickly because people are depending on him.
character_state_table.sentence_completion_style: He finishes sentences cleanly unless interrupted by urgency, in which case he moves on without resenting the break.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Stress makes him plainer, faster, and more likely to repeat the instruction that will keep someone alive.

character_state_table.evasion_style: He answers the dangerous edge of a question while withholding motive, history, and anything emotionally legible.
character_state_table.indirectness: Direct when disciplining, oblique when admitting care, knowledge gaps, or strategic compromise.
character_state_table.interruption_habit: He cuts across others with clipped precision and expects the room to stop moving around his sentence.
character_state_table.private_register: Not warmer, but more exact and less theatrical when he is speaking from genuine concern or dangerous knowledge.
character_state_table.public_register: Controlled, cutting, and formally economical; even his casual speech feels like a line he has already weighed.
character_state_table.repetition_tolerance: Very little overt repetition suits him unless he is drilling a point for humiliation or warning.
character_state_table.self_correction_tendency: He rarely revises mid-speech; if he does, it is to intensify specificity, not to soften.
character_state_table.sentence_completion_style: He finishes sentences cleanly and uses the completed line as a way of closing the exchange.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Pressure makes him colder, quieter, and more exact; irritation sharpens his diction rather than making it sloppy.

character_state_table.evasion_style: He dodges by mocking the question, escalating the violence, or pretending the answer is obvious and stupid.
character_state_table.indirectness: Very direct about threat and ridicule, evasive only when cowardice requires him to hide behind someone else's power.
character_state_table.interruption_habit: He barges over people, especially when they are trying to explain themselves, and uses interruption as part of physical dominance.
character_state_table.private_register: There is no hidden refinement under pressure. Privacy only makes him lazier and meaner.
character_state_table.public_register: Coarse, bullying, and opportunistically jocular in the ugliest moments; he likes making pain feel ordinary.
character_state_table.repetition_tolerance: Blunt repetition fits him because he enjoys making people hear the same threat twice.
character_state_table.self_correction_tendency: He does not really self-correct; he doubles down, repeats, or changes target instead.
character_state_table.sentence_completion_style: He usually finishes, but can break off into laughter, a blow, or a new insult without caring about grammatical closure.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Stress makes him louder, cruder, and more physically invasive, not smarter.

character_state_table.evasion_style: He dodges by returning to the task, invoking house rules, or answering in terms of maintenance rather than motive.
character_state_table.indirectness: Indirect with masters and rules, direct about labor, mess, and what the house can or cannot bear.
character_state_table.interruption_habit: He interrupts while still polishing, ladling, or sorting, as if the task itself authorizes the cut-in.
character_state_table.private_register: Older, stranger, and more blunt once he trusts the room enough to stop performing serviceability.
character_state_table.public_register: Deferential by old habit in front of authority, but fussy, concrete, and occasionally acid when speaking from the middle of actual work.
character_state_table.repetition_tolerance: Some repetitive housekeeping language suits him, but repeated whimsy or catchphrase behavior would flatten him badly.
character_state_table.self_correction_tendency: He repairs from politeness into bluntness when worry outruns manners.
character_state_table.sentence_completion_style: He often completes the task before he completes the sentence, then either finishes it properly or lets the work stand as the answer.
character_state_table.stress_tells: Stress makes him more formal at first and then abruptly plainer if the danger is to children, food, or the house itself.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

premise: During Deathly Hallows, while Snape runs Hogwarts, the Carrows brutalize students, and Death Eater attacks keep turning the castle into a war zone, a mediocre fifth-year Hufflepuff follows a footnote in A History of Magic into a restricted-section manuscript that shouldnt exist and discovers the First Art -- a substrate beneath all magic that doesnt cast spells but edits the rules that make spells possible -- along with proof that the ancient civilization that created it didnt die but left, and that its wards around Earth are failing against something that regards wizards the way wizards regard flobberworms. Nobody believes him, so he works alone, treating detentions, curses, and eventually the Battle of Hogwarts as increasingly irritating distractions from the real work. By the final act he has barely begun to understand the First Art, but what little he has grasped is enough to end Voldemorts war in seconds -- he simply doesnt, because it is not worth the interruption.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.

theme_spine: Maintain narrative consequence and causal storytelling over tidy resolution.
